name: Audi Type K
description: The first car produced by Audi in 1910.

name: Auto Union Type C
description: Iconic racing car that won the German Grand Prix every year from 1934 to 1939.

name: Audi 100
description: Produced from 1968 to 1994 in various generations.

name: Audi quattro
description: The first production car with permanent four-wheel drive.

name: Audi V8
description: High-performance grand tourer produced from 1988 to 1994.

name: Audi TT
description: Sports car introduced in 1998, known for its sleek design and handling.

name: Audi R8
description: High-performance mid-engine sports car introduced in 2006.

name: Audi A4
description: Compact executive car produced since 1994, currently in its fifth generation.

name: Audi A6
description: Executive car produced since 1994, currently in its fifth generation.

name: Audi A8
description: Flagship luxury sedan introduced in 1994, currently in its fourth generation.
